_implications: Ranking favors high-frequency table-stakes with S/M build cost
Discount L-cost gaps unless they're literal deal-blockers
Push card creation across all 8+ products, not concentrate on Zergboard
Positioning briefs should emphasize the unified Zstack narrative since breadth > depth
Zerglytics is the next live target — its review should drive concrete website + product cards
Bucket calc uses 0.75 / 0.25 thresholds instead of 0.60 / 0.25
Frequency: yes=1.0, partial=0.5 (currently both count as 1.0)
cards.py drops any L-cost item before slicing top_n
rank.py defaults change from fit=3,cost=M to fit=4,cost=M
positioning.md = ~10 lines: elevator + 5 differentiator one-liners + 3 headlines
positioning-deep.md = full ~60 lines with pillars, anti-pitch, objection handling
New pricing.md with table: rows=competitors, cols=free-tier-limits, cheapest paid $/seat, mid $/seat, enterprise
Each competitors/<name>.md gets a Pricing section with their own tier prices + free-tier limits
Pricing pages still scraped, but the LLM extracts dollar amounts and seat caps, not which features are gated where
index.md leads with top-10 ranked gaps table, then counts/diff/links below
When sources disagree, mark feature as partial/unclear and cite each source in evidence column
Positioning brief mentions top complaints as context but builds differentiator angles primarily from what we have
Each Reddit/HN quote tagged [confidence: high/med/low] based on subreddit relevance + engagement
New "Recent ships (last 90d)" section in each competitors/<name>.md with top 3 changelog items
index.md gets a category-level momentum sentence: "This quarter the category shipped X, Y, Z."
cards.py is effectively disabled in batch/cron flows until card-board decision is made
monthly_refresh.sh skips cards.py entirely (it already does — no change needed)
When card flow resumes: table-stakes + drift auto-create, others confirm, board logic per stage 5b
Slack digest stays as current shape: counts + top 5 changes per month
index.md frontmatter gets rating: 1-5 (or per-section: positioning_ok, matrix_ok, gaps_ok, drift_ok)
priors.py learns to read frontmatter ratings from prior archived runs
compare/report prompts get a USER PRIOR FEEDBACK section if any past feedback exists
Claude (me) ask 1-2 follow-up questions after any interactive run completes
Slack monthly digest does NOT prompt for feedback (per Stage 7)

stage_6_seeds.note: Will review the 18 hardcoded seed lists in run_queue.py after seeing tonight queue results in the morning. Bad seeds are easier to fix with real data.

_summary_changes_vs_baseline: Partial presence weight 1.0 → 0.5 (enterprise-only features count half)
Hard cap on L-cost gaps from top-10 cards
Batch rank defaults: fit=3 → fit=4 (lean toward act)
New pricing.md with TIER PRICES table + per-competitor pricing sections
index.md leads with top-10 ranked gaps table (was at-a-glance counts)
Source conflicts flagged in evidence column rather than picking a winner
G2 complaints feed positioning at medium weight (was heavy)
index.md gets a category momentum sentence
Card creation PAUSED — cards.py gated until board decision
Feedback loop: rating + feedback frontmatter fields, injected into next-run prompts
